prompt: A moody storybook-style digital painting of a young girl sitting sideways on a cushioned window seat inside an old European attic room, hugging her knees and gazing out through a large rain-streaked window. She has chestnut brown slightly messy shoulder-length hair, a cozy oversized cable-knit sweater, and soft striped socks, with bare legs tucked close to her body. The composition is intimate and contemplative, viewed from inside the room at a slight angle, with the child placed in the lower left foreground and the rainy city filling the right side and background. Outside the window is a dense cluster of steep-roofed old town houses, chimneys, crooked rooftops, and 2 tall vintage street lamps visible near the window, all under a dramatic overcast sky with heavy layered storm clouds and visible falling rain. The glass is covered with raindrops, rivulets, and wet reflections, and the rooftops outside are mostly muted gray, while the interior glows with warm amber light from the left, creating a strong contrast between the cozy room and the cold storm outside. Include a patterned cushion behind her, a worn upholstered bench with subtle floral fabric, dark curtains framing the left edge, and soft painterly textures with detailed brushwork on wood, fabric, hair, and rain. Color palette: warm browns, beige, muted gold, slate gray, charcoal, and soft silver. Atmosphere: melancholic, quiet, nostalgic, cinematic, whimsical, and emotionally tender. Highly detailed, painterly illustration, children’s book fantasy realism, dramatic lighting, depth through layered rooftops, no text, no watermark.
